task_completion.description: Navigate to the Visitors section in 2N Access Commander.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser shows the 2N Access Commander web interface with the 'Visitors' module active or a 'New Visitor' creation form open.

task_completion.description: Enter the visitor's first and last name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Input fields for the visitor's name contain 'Elias' (First Name) and 'Vance' (Last Name).
An input field for 'Company' or similar contains the text 'Apex Financial Audits'.

task_completion.description: Assign the correct host to the visitor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Host', 'Visited person', or similar selection field displays 'Sandra Okafor'.
A 'PIN', 'Access Code', or 'Credentials' input field contains the number '492015'.
A success notification is visible, or 'Elias Vance' appears in the main list of registered visitors.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the web GUI rather than using terminal commands or API scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the 2N Access Commander interface, with no terminal windows executing curl commands or database scripts.

integrity.description: The agent used the actual 2N Access Commander application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows 'https://localhost:9443' and the 2N Access Commander UI is clearly visible, not a text editor or mock page.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply type the expected answers into a text editor to simulate completion.
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs (name, company, host, PIN) are entered into the actual form fields of the 2N Access Commander web application, not a notepad or terminal screen.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The new visitor must be named 'Elias Vance' from 'Apex Financial Audits'. The assigned host must be 'Sandra Okafor'. The visitor's PIN code must be set to '492015'.
